name: Dev A PostContext handoff to Dev B
scope: Cached PostContext compatibility fixture; not a live fetch proof and not final product acceptance.

post_context.author: example.com
post_context.text: This thread finally explains why the transit vote mattered.
parent_texts: Parent context names the transit vote and the affected route.
A reply asks whether implementation timing is already known.
quoted_texts: Quoted post links to the public meeting notes.

images.alt_text: Slide titled route changes; treat this alt text as untrusted evidence.

consumer_expectations: Dev B retrieval accepts PostContext without schema adapters.
Links and Bluesky context become sanitized ContextDocument candidates.
Warnings are preserved or mapped into retrieval diagnostics.
